item.title: No more eggplant!!
item.description: I went in for SRS on Friday, which is something that's been in the works for a while. It's been a little over three years since I officially came out, and 13 years since I really started questioning. It's been an interesting and rewarding journey and I don't expect that to change anytime soon.

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Spectateur & La Cantina - Touk-Touk YouTube: https://youtu.be/pHFtzd9Ii6k?si=1pFXwBWRQkTS37w_ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7c8g6xoxoULuIHrrapSZkV?si=5ce1fdbfb7a04bd2

Gevorg Grigoryan
GA IS
TBD
Pierre Alexandre
Kanu
Neil Ross
SoMuch3D
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: The facebook lie.
item.description: Can we just do this please? I don't want to see anything if it isn't posted by people I'm already friends with. That's it, that's all I want. It's that fucking simple. Hiding posts means you just put more shit on my feed to see what sticks. Nothing is ever going to stick. Even if I am interested, I'm reporting it on principle anyway because that's not what I'm on facebook for.
item.dc:creator: sascottsn

item.title: Bottom Shelf Cake Day 2024 Recap.
item.description:
I got the notification that today is my 7th Cake Day with Imgur. I decided to roll back through my photos from this time last year and do a walk through of everything that happened. 2024 has been the biggest year OF MY LIFE. I couldn't even cram everything in without turning most photos into a collage. Thank you all so much for your support. Let's start by rolling it back to Christmas of 2023 when I got auto timed out by Imgur for "spamming"
On Christmas day, I got bored and started scrolling through everyone's selfies on Imgur. For the gals, I said "her inbox on selfie day" with a photo of hotdogs. For the guys, I posted "his inbox on selfie day" with a photo of tacos. The automod was not a fan.
About this time last year I hit 100 trophies! (and 666,666 updoots) Today I have 147 trophies...and...my father is still no where to be found.
On January 23, 2024 Someone mailed us a potato. Since that day, we have dubbed the Post Office the P.O.tato Box..and y'all have sent me and Frothy some wild shit this year.
Back in November (during Extra-Life 2023) the Bottom Shelf Community raised $12,458. It took MONTHS to paint all the canvases I owed to every amazing person who donated 100 or more dollars FERDA kids.
Here's a few of them.
We even ate the world's HOTTEST chocolate bar before Frothy read chat a bedtime story on https://twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Back when we had 350 followers and maybe 10 viewers.
In March, we tricked Cozy Cabin Studios into thinking we were notable enough to get to play their game BEFORE IT WAS AVAILABLE ON STEAM. That truly felt like our "made it" moment. I couldn't believe a developer would give us keys to anything.
Around this time, our P.O.tato was ready to be planted. He produced a beautiful family full of potato babies that we will be mailing out this week to everyone in our community who donated 100 or more dollars during Extra-Life 2024.
My husband and I took our son camping more, and I took two of the coolest pictures ever.
I would love to paint them on canvas one day.
In April, we received a package from Extra-Life that featured a plaque of a drawing from one of the children who was impacted by our funds raised.
On April 8th, Frothy and I found an empty fishing dock on the lake and got to watch the eclipse together while our son got to hang out with his Papa for their own special eclipse retreat.
On April 20th, we got to take our son to see Conner Price at the House of Blues. I made him a poster to help him stand out.
He is a Conner Price super fan. He knows every word to every song, and the concert blew his little mind.
A core memory was unlocked when Conner called him out from the stage. I wasn't recording, but there was someone who caught the interaction on video and sent it to me after the concert.
On June 12, we took our son to pick out an axolotl of his own.
He named her Hiley (yes, @HileyNoteson ) after "the girl who plays Sea of Thieves with me and my dad" ❤️
We also got him tickets to see his two favorite bands AJR and Twenty-One-Pilots later in the year.
Here's the boy all decked out in concert merch. We always go way large so he can wear the t-shirts in high school.
On June 14th, @FrothyStout and I celebrated our 12th anniversary.
4th of July with Frothy was lit! I got to wear my trashy PBR cowboy hat and indulge on beer and too many hotdogs!
On July 10th, we went to the AJR concert. Our seats were pretty far back, but unbeknownst to us, they spent a potion of the concert just a few rows over IN THE AUDIENCE.
On July 31st, I got to meet my best friend in person for the first time who I met on our server a little over a year ago now. She took me barhopping and then dragged my drunk ass to sing karaoke.
I got to hear her kill it on the mic (but she asked me not to point the camera at her while she sang or she'd get nervous)
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
On July 31st, the same friend that took me barhopping stayed with me!! (And so did her bestest boy Kirby) we spent a lot of time binge watching YouTube and painting.
The thought of August 7th still makes stomach curdle.
Boy, did you guys deliver.
Of all the weird shit you made us eat, Kit-Kat dunked in bean dip was shockingly the absolute worst of all of it. It made Frothy throw up (off camera)
During the beautiful days of August/September, the 3 of us spent a lot of time camping in the back yard. It's cheating, for sure, but so much fun. We still had electricity, WiFi, OUR FANS, and we could binge watch movies..but still use a real toilet when we needed to.
I also started taking painting a little more seriously
On September 6th, we got to take the boy to see Twenty-One-Pilots, his 3rd concert in one year.
The next weekend, the boy stayed with his grandparents while Frothy and I vibed out at a Two Feet concert (my favorite artist)
...and I got absolutely trashed.
During LITERALLY ALL OF OCTOBER (744 hours) Frothy and I took turns streaming non stop on https://twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka to raise money for Extra-Life. Our wholesome, chaotic community raised another $9,438 FERDA kids.
On November 2nd, The Imgur™ invited ME, a Bottom™ to host Imgur's 24 hour Extra-Life 2024 live stream. Suddenly, THAT was our "made it" moment.
Imgur was kind enough to let Frothy and I break away from the stream for a few hours so we could go meet my husband's favorite YouTube creators that he has watched for over a decade, Neebs Gaming. They were coincidentally in town on the same day. We had VIP tickets (which I had never had for anyone before) to their 2 day Horde Fest event. We got to take our photo with the gang, and we also got to meet the The Fun Pimps (the developers of 7 Days To Die) AND WE GOT TO BE THE FIRST TO PLAY "BLOOD MOON" before it's release. I died immediately to to my own negligence...fall damage from nerd poling..but Frothy carried the team, as usual and won! That night we went to Walmart to print the picture in hopes that the Neebs cast would be willing to sign it on day 2 of the event.
And they did. And it's framed now.
At the end of November, I decided to sign the name of every person who supports our channel via paid, prime, or gifted subs. My chair went from blank white:
to this. I want to cry everytime I see it. I am so overwhelmed with everything that has happened so far.
..I painted a couple of canvases for Christmas.
Now it's December and we adopted a kitten named...Potato and just when you thought the year couldn't get any bigger, I accidentally started beef with my first "internet celebrity" (yes, the same video I posted in my dump yesterday, but I didn't realize my cake day way today or I would have saved it.)
So, last Sunday, my buddy Fukiplays invited us to watch him play as one of five contestants all competing for the heart of one woman named Rita on a live e-dating stream on Twitch. My husband, @FrothyStout along with a few other people from our server grabbed our popcorn and tuned into the stream to enjoy the chaos together. During the stream, Rita was asking all the contestants to rate her on a scale of 1-10. Apparently this was not an open question, because when I typed "Looks wise, she's an 8, but personality she's a 3."..she lost her goddamn mind. Although, I was only participating in the stream as a viewer, she made me feel like a real star when she spent TEN WHOLE MINUTES derailing the E-date to rant about ME, the Bottom™, who had the audacity to type anything in the twitch chat. You can see the full 10 minute meltdown https://youtu.be/dbGnkkiQtWc?si=wBBynpfz7xVv2L_P ..but here's an Imgur sized snippet.
The following evening, I decided to share the 10 minute video of her tantrum on https://twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka where she decided to make a surprise appearance to the watch party. I'll hand it to her though. She was a good sport throughout the video break down and stayed for the whole ride. For more context, that full video can be found https://youtu.be/UrYc0Xw5AdU?si=g0HdCh8rwwET-4KM
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Not to be dramatic, but I have been in actual tears...like ugly crying trying to get through this post. Looking through everything in a one year glance is really forcing me to process all the changes that have happened so quickly. We've made a ton of friends, and we've lost really good friends along the way as well. Nothing feels real anymore, and I'm so glad I got the notification about my cake day so I would just take a fucking moment to reflect, absorb,...and sob. We couldn't have done ANY of this without you guys, and I mean that from the bottom of my heart. After a year and a half of streaming, Imgur is STILL the only platform we have ever advertised our discord server or our twitch channel to. All of this wild support came from THIS community HERE. I know things are changing, but the people are still amazing. I'm so thankful to have crossed paths with so many meme loving, shit posting, degens. You guys have changed my life more than you will ever know. Something something discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Send Luigi some love.
item.description:
I did check to make sure this information is accurate. However, Do NOT send money to an inmate using this facility's address.
If you would like to send a monetary donation, instructions for your preferred method can be found here: https://www.bop.gov/inmates/communications.jsp
item.dc:creator: AwesomeDad420

item.title: Red Cardinal Down!
item.description:
I heard a thump on the window to find this.
He hit the window
just a bit dazed
Feeling better.
After 27 minutes, full recovery.
